sandbox_town_backend/src/main/java/com/s.general_idea: Activate Spring Cache abstraction to support caching annotations in the application.
Activate Spring Task scheduling to support scheduled methods in the application.

sandbox_town_backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the newer JDK.
Remove the spring-boot-devtools dependency, likely no longer needed or replaced by other tooling.
Add spring-boot-starter-websocket to support WebSocket communication for real-time features.
Add fastjson library for JSON serialization and deserialization.
Add MySQL Connector/J driver to enable connectivity with MySQL databases.
Add MyBatis-Plus starter to simplify database operations and reduce boilerplate SQL code.
Add Sa-Token Redis DAO integration for session management using Redis with Jackson serialization.
Add Apache Commons Pool2 to provide connection pooling for Redis clients.
Add Sa-Token Spring Boot starter to integrate authentication and authorization features.
Explicitly configure the maven-compiler-plugin to use source and target level 15, overriding or supplementing the property setting.

sandbox_town_frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Remove the perlin-simplex library as it is no longer used in the project.
Add the uuid library to generate unique identifiers for entities like random names.
Upgrade the uuid library from version 8.3.2 to 9.0.0 to align with the new explicit dependency.

sandbox_town_frontend/package.json.general_idea: Removed the perlin-simplex library, likely replaced by a native implementation or different noise algorithm.
Added the uuid library to generate unique identifiers for entities like random names.
Disabled the no-unused-vars ESLint rule to suppress warnings about unused variables.
